//: enforza-cockpit — a Cockpit menu entry that opens the nftables firewall GUI (index.html). Cockpit serves this package's static files and injects ../base1/cockpit.js at runtime; the plugin opens no port of its own and inherits Cockpit's auth + TLS.
//csp: The CCX design system + our DOM builder use inline style attributes; Cockpit's strict default CSP would block them (style-src falls back to 'self'). Allow inline styles + local images/data URIs; keep ws/wss so the cockpit channel transport still works.
content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws: wss:; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'
